en: order of the Queen. Who is the Queen? The Queen, the Queen of England, the ruler of
Great Britain. She who was ordained by God. Which God?
God, the one true God. There are many gods my friend, what is the name of your
God? There is only one God and his name is God and you too shall worship him.
You want me to worship a God but you don't want to tell me his name? What are
you talking about? There are many gods, okay? There is Shiva, there is Lakshmi,
there is Hare Krishna, there are many gods. What is the name of your God? His
